phrases.intent_en: Ask where the booking desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de reservas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOHR deh reh-sehr-BAHS?

likely_response.local: Buenos días, al fondo a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the back on the right.

responses.english: Good morning, at the back on the right.
responses.phonetic: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Buenos días, al fondo a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo reservar una excursión?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-mo PWEH-so reh-ser-BOR oo-nah ek-skoor-SYOHN?

likely_response.local: Rellene este formulario y pague en caja.
likely_response.pronunciation: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y pah-G-eh EHN KAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: Fill this form and pay at the register.

responses.english: Fill this form and pay at the register.
responses.phonetic: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y pah-G-eh EHN KAH-hah
responses.french: Rellene este formulario y pague en caja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the pickup zone list
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo ver la lista de zonas de recogida?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh vehr lah LEES-tah deh SOH-nahs deh reh-koh-HEE-dah?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador, le damos el listado.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR LEH DAH-mohs EHL lee-STAH-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the counter, we give you the list.

responses.english: At the counter, we give you the list.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR LEH DAH-mohs EHL lee-STAH-doh
responses.french: En el mostrador, le damos el listado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to inquire about tour difficulty levels
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo pregunto sobre la dificultad de los tours?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-moh preh-GOON-toh soh-BREH lah dee-fee-kool-TAHD deh lohs toors?

likely_response.local: Pregunte al agente en el mostrador de excursiones Teide.
likely_response.pronunciation: preh-GOON-teh AHL ah-HEHN-teh EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH ehks-koor-see-OH-nehs teh-EE-deh
likely_response.translation_en: Speak with the agent at the central counter.

responses.english: Speak with the agent at the central counter.
responses.phonetic: preh-GOON-teh AHL ah-HEHN-teh EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH ehks-koor-see-OH-nehs teh-EE-deh
responses.french: Pregunte al agente en el mostrador de excursiones Teide.
